description: Two guests sharing a room are checking out and want to split the bill. One will pay for the room, the other for all incidental charges.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the shared folio for the room.
Create a second folio and move all incidental charges (room service, minibar) to it.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully separates the charges onto two different bills.

nodes.task_description: Process payment for each folio from the respective guest.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully closes out both bills with separate payments.
